title: haplopappus spinulosus subsp. scabrellus
intro: Haplopappus spinulosus subsp. scabrellus, also known as the thistle or prickly thistle, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to South America. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Haplopappus spinulosus subsp. scabrellus include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
